Screenshots — The Forgotten Isle · Unreal Engine 5

Overview

A Living, Breathing Island World.

The Forgotten Isle is a fully explorable open-world island environment built in Unreal Engine 5. Featuring lush terrain, dynamic water systems, dense foliage, and cinematic lighting — every corner of the island has been crafted to feel alive and immersive.

This project focuses on environment art, landscape sculpting, and atmospheric design — pushing Unreal Engine 5's Nanite and Lumen systems to create a world that looks and feels real at every angle.

Development Process

Built using UE5's landscape tools, procedural foliage placement, and Lumen global illumination. All assets were curated and optimised for visual fidelity while keeping performance in check across the entire environment.

Engine Unreal Engine 5
Scripting Landscape & Foliage Tools
Genre Environment / Showcase
Platform PC (Windows)
Duration Solo Project
Year 2024
Status Completed
What I Built

Key Features & Systems

🏛

Level Design

Hand-crafted temple environments with layered traps, secret passages, and progression pacing designed to keep players engaged.

🧩

Puzzle Mechanics

Interactive puzzles using Blueprint scripting — pressure plates, movable objects, and environmental triggers woven into the level layout.

💡

Lighting & Atmosphere

UE5 Lumen-powered dynamic lighting with torches, god rays, and shadow play to create a moody, cinematic atmosphere throughout.

🎨

3D Asset Integration

Sourced and integrated high-quality 3D assets — optimised for performance while maintaining visual fidelity across the entire game world.

🔊

Sound Design

Ambient soundscapes, triggered audio cues, and reactive sound effects that reinforce exploration and add tension to trap sequences.

⚙️

Blueprint Scripting

All game logic built using UE5 Blueprint — from character movement and camera control to interactive objects and game state management.
